creator: glarkin@FreeBSD.org
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

Hi Steve,

I am working on adding this port to the tree, but I get a checksum
mismatch error when fetching the dist file.  The distinfo specifies an
MD5 value of:

8ebe3e16d45faa2a3514e89c575e33f4

but the one I fetched from SourceForge has an MD5 value of:

3dda91f9bac1568d43b6217e19501be8

Can you tell me if this is the correct distfile and whether I should
update the distinfo file or not?

Regards,
Greg
- --
Greg Larkin

http://www.FreeBSD.org/       - The Power To Serve
http://www.sourcehosting.net/ - Ready. Set. Code.
